overall.description: A nighttime walk through an urban commercial district in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), featuring a brightly lit Toyota dealership with red and blue neon signage. The camera moves along covered walkways, crosses intersections, and passes under highway overpasses while moderate traffic flows through wet streets reflecting the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane road

events.description: dark sedan drives past on the left side of the walkway
white SUV passes by on the wet road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing traffic and the illuminated Toyota dealership ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past the walkway on the wet road

entered.detail: metal scaffolding and roof covering the pedestrian walkway with overhead lights
building with bright horizontal red and blue neon stripes and illuminated Toyota signage
tall yellow sodium vapor street lamps lining the road

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered scaffolding walkway at night, with the brightly lit Toyota dealership visible ahead. The wet road to the left has sparse traffic passing by, and the area is illuminated by overhead walkway lights and distant street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching commercial auto dealership

events.description: slight turn to the right as the walkway curves toward the intersection
approaching the end of the covered walkway, opening up to the street intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the Toyota dealership becomes more prominent on the left, approaching the end of the covered section

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving slowly past the dealership on the wet road

entered.detail: vertical pole with traffic signal lights visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the covered walkway with the Toyota dealership now prominent on the left. The walkway begins to curve right as it approaches the intersection, with traffic lights becoming visible ahead and moderate vehicle traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with auto dealership and highway overpass

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street intersection area
turning right at the corner, moving away from the Toyota dealership toward the underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating the street corner, moving away from the Toyota dealership and toward the underpass intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with support columns spanning the road
yellow diamond-shaped warning sign with pedestrian symbol
large illuminated advertising billboard with multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open intersection with the highway overpass visible ahead. The camera turns right at the corner, passing a pedestrian crossing sign and leaving the Toyota dealership behind, while navigating around vehicles waiting at the traffic lights.

events.description: traffic light changes to green, vehicles begin moving through the intersection
yellow SUV and blue sports car drive through the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street under the overpass, navigating between moving vehicles at the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow SUV driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the highway overpass above

segments.scene_description: Walking under the highway overpass through a multi-lane intersection. The traffic light changes to green and vehicles including a yellow SUV move through the wet streets. The area is illuminated by street lights under the bridge and the glow of a nearby billboard, with concrete support columns lining the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, open intersection beneath a highway overpass. It begins under a covered scaffolding walkway at night, moving toward a brightly lit Toyota dealership that glows in the distance while sparse traffic passes on the wet road to the left. As the camera continues forward, the walkway curves right and the dealership becomes prominent on the left before the path opens up into a busy intersection. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the shelter and turns right at the corner, passing a pedestrian crossing sign and leaving the dealership behind to navigate around vehicles waiting at the lights. Finally, the movement leads under the concrete columns of a highway overpass where the light turns green, allowing a yellow SUV and other cars to flow through the rain-slicked streets under the glow of street lamps and a nearby billboard.
